title: Dimension emptiness
description: Prepare yourself for a harrowing journey with the "Dimensions void" data pack! This pack introduces a nightmarish dimension known as the Void, a realm where no soul remains after the inevitable demise of all living things. Here, darkness reigns supreme, an
body:
![mushroom_happiness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f289f2ed7ec3160cf8c988470e71cb59f4e575a.jpeg)

- 📦
in this small addon i added some structures, fixed some bugs and also decided to improve the abyss, specifically the shafts and the top of the abyss, before the abyss was empty and sometimes structures appeared, but now in the abyss appeared something like mushroom sharp from the usual minecraft, but with improved mushrooms and without mycelium, the affected biome was l-02.


2026
The biomes have been improved; they're now less empty. All old buildings have been removed, 13 new ones have been added, a crash in one of the old biomes has been fixed, and one old biome has been restored. I'm continuing to experiment with biomes, working on a new lair, and considering improving dungeons and caves.
